company.name: United Energy Workers Healthcare
company.description: Home health for former DOE energy workers under EEOICPA and RECA federal compensation programs
company.structure: Integrated pipeline, claims, and care platform with three regional sister companies

constraints: Support, assistance, guidance only - never filing, directing, or acting on behalf of claimants
PHI requires Compliance review for any system handling patient data
Anti-kickback statute compliance required for referral or partnership relationships
DOL audit requirements for EEOICPA claims handling
HIPAA for any PHI touch points

agentPatterns.name: Compliance Sub-Agent
agentPatterns.description: Reviews any AI output before user-facing display, flags PHI or compliance risk, escalates to human review

agentPatterns.name: Orchestrator Agent
agentPatterns.description: Coordinates multi-agent workflows, routes tasks to specialized agents, maintains conversation state

agentPatterns.name: Knowledge Layer
agentPatterns.description: RAG implementation grounding agent responses in authoritative sources (EEOICPA bulletins, internal policies)

agentPatterns.name: Human Review Gate
agentPatterns.description: Required checkpoint for high-stakes decisions, ensures human oversight on patient-facing actions
